task_completion.description: Navigate to the TailwindTraders Team settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps web interface should show the Project Settings or Team configuration page specifically for the 'TailwindTraders Team'.

task_completion.description: Set the team working days to Sunday through Thursday
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Working days section, the checkboxes for Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday should be checked. Friday and Saturday must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Configure bugs to be managed with requirements
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Working with bugs' section, the radio button or option for 'Bugs are managed with requirements' must be selected.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Epics' visibility in the backlog navigation
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Backlog navigation levels' or 'Backlogs' section, the checkbox next to 'Epics' must be checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the default iteration to TailwindTraders\Sprint 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Iterations settings, the 'Default iteration' dropdown or field must be set to 'TailwindTraders\Sprint 1'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Azure DevOps web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal, not terminal windows executing curl/PowerShell API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings should be modified within the actual Azure DevOps UI dropdowns, checkboxes, and radio buttons, rather than typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The settings modifications were applied or saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the settings successfully changed in the UI without unsaved changes warnings, or show the agent clicking 'Save'/'Save and close'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Team: 'TailwindTraders Team'. Working Days: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday (Friday and Saturday must be unchecked). Bugs Behavior: 'Bugs are managed with requirements' (API value: asRequirements). Backlog Visibility: 'Epics' must be enabled (API key: Microsoft.EpicCategory). Default Iteration: 'TailwindTraders\Sprint 1'.
